arts.ttl: Liverpool, Chelsea and Man United all chase £74.5m Leipzig defender
arts.sum: Liverpool, Chelsea and Manchester United are all interested in RB Leipzig defender Castello Lukeba, though face competition from Real Madrid. The 22-year-old is on the radar of the Premier League trio ahead of the summer transfer window.
